overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing three different characters walking through a futuristic neon-lit city. The video begins with a character ascending stairs and walking along elevated sidewalks, transitions through a narrow alley with vending machines, and ends at the NCPD police station plaza. The footage features high-quality ray-traced graphics with vibrant neon signage against a clear daytime sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with neon storefronts

events.description: finishes ascending concrete stairs and transitions to level sidewalk
exits covered walkway into more open plaza area with direct sunlight
approaches street intersection with crosswalk markings

agents.ego_description: ascending stairs and walking along an elevated sidewalk, passing neon signs and approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: overweight man in white tank top walking ahead, then stopping to lean against wall

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase ascending between brutalist buildings
large glowing cyan neon sign with Japanese characters for ramen restaurant
green painted metal safety railing along sidewalk edge
elevated walkway connecting two buildings with glass sides
large digital advertisement for El Guapo on building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with the character ascending a wide concrete staircase in a futuristic urban environment. The camera follows in third-person as the character walks along a covered sidewalk lined with vibrant neon signs, including a prominent cyan ramen sign. The area is sparsely populated with few pedestrians, and the architecture features brutalist concrete walls mixed with modern glass towers. The character approaches an open plaza area with scattered trash and digital billboards visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow urban alley with vending machines and digital billboards

events.description: enters narrow alleyway with concrete walls from open plaza
passes purple vending machines on the left side of the alley
moves into deeper shadow cast by surrounding tall buildings

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow city alley, passing vending machines and digital billboards while approaching the NCPD district

notable_agents.action: woman in yellow dress with pink hair and cybernetic arm walking toward camera
man in dark green jacket walking ahead through the alley

entered.detail: tall plain concrete wall with small industrial windows
bright purple and red automated vending machines with glowing displays
large wall covered with multiple glowing digital advertisements including Samurai logo
orange metal crowd control barriers lining the sidewalk edge
blue and white NCPD police station sign visible at end of alley

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow urban alley flanked by tall concrete walls. The camera follows a man in a dark jacket as he walks past distinctive purple vending machines and orange crowd barriers. Digital billboards cover the right wall, displaying various advertisements. The alley is dimly lit with shadows cast by surrounding buildings, and the NCPD police station sign becomes visible in the distance. A woman in a yellow dress with cybernetic implants walks past in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: NCPD police station plaza with crosswalks and market stalls

events.description: crossing yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk toward NCPD building
entering covered area under NCPD building overhang
approaching NCPD entrance with increased pedestrian density

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at a crosswalk and walking through the NCPD plaza area, navigating through moderate crowds

notable_agents.action: woman with red hair wearing blue crop top and green shorts walking ahead toward NCPD
woman with glowing blue cybernetic visor and face implants walking alongside

entered.detail: large police station with distinctive blue NCPD signage and orange structural canopy
broad pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes
large cylindrical orange industrial tank with ventilation grates
tall palm trees lining the street in front of the NCPD building
street vendor stall with red fabric canopy and various goods

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the alley and crosses a wide yellow-striped crosswalk toward the prominent NCPD police station, identifiable by its blue signage and orange structural elements. The plaza is moderately crowded with pedestrians, including a woman with red hair and another with glowing cybernetic implants. Palm trees and an orange industrial cylinder mark the streetscape. The character walks under the NCPD building's overhang, passing market stalls and security barriers while steam vents release vapor into the air.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic urban landscape that transitions from elevated concrete walkways into a narrow alleyway and finally opens into a bustling police plaza. It begins with a character ascending a wide staircase and walking along a covered sidewalk lined with cyan neon signs and brutalist architecture. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts into a dimly lit, narrow alley flanked by tall walls, purple vending machines, and digital billboards before the NCPD police station sign appears in the distance. The camera then follows the character as they emerge from the shadows and cross a yellow-striped street, moving through a crowded plaza filled with pedestrians and palm trees. Finally, the movement leads under the overhang of the NCPD building, passing market stalls and venting steam as the character approaches the security barriers.
